# AZ-900 Lab 03 – Deploy Azure Container Instances

## 🎯 Objective

Run containers without managing VMs.

---

## 🧠 Key Concepts

### Azure Container Instances (ACI)

- Run containers directly
- No VM management

---

## 💡 Exam-Relevant Points

- Simple container hosting
- No orchestration

---

## 🔍 Deep Dive

### When to use ACI?

- short-lived jobs
- testing
- simple workloads

### Comparison

- ACI → simple
- AKS → complex orchestration

---

## 🧪 Quiz

### Question 1

What is ACI?

A) Database  
B) Container service  
C) VM  
D) Network  

<details><summary>Show answer</summary>
✅ B
</details>
